events.event_description: The American Embassy at Salisbury (now Harare) was established upon Zimbabwe's attainment of independence, with Jeffrey Davidow as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on April 18, 1980, when the American Embassy at Salisbury (now Harare) was established with Jeffrey Davidow as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
